title: evodianthus funifer subsp. fendlerianus
intro: Evodianthus funifer subsp. fendlerianus, commonly known as Fendler's evodia, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Evodia plant preparations, typically in the form of teas or infusions, are used to extract its medicinal properties, while also being used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
